title: Project Manager – SAP SuccessFactors (w/m/x)
required_skills: 3 completed implementation projects in Employee Central and/or Talent modules
SAP SuccessFactors certification (Employee Central + Talent Management)
Sales experience including proposal writing and client presentations
German and English at C1 level
matched_skills: Project management experience — HSBC PMO governance, Hapag-Lloyd sprint delivery
Stakeholder management — C-suite reporting and cross-functional coordination
English C1 — meets English language requirement
Leadership and team coordination — multi-workstream management at HSBC
missing_skills: SAP SuccessFactors technical expertise (zero SAP background in CV)
SAP SuccessFactors certifications (Employee Central, Talent Management)
Sales/business development experience in consulting context
core_responsibilities: Lead SAP SuccessFactors projects focusing on Employee Central and Talent Management
Take project accountability including time, budget, and resource planning
Create compelling client proposals and conduct pitches
Coordinate collaboration with internal and external stakeholders
Ensure quality and success of implementation
recommended_emphasis: Programme governance and multi-workstream delivery (HSBC) for general PM credentials
Budget governance experience for financial project management dimension
summary: Scoring 11.1, this is a very poor match. IBM iX's SAP SuccessFactors Project Manager role demands 8+ years of SAP SuccessFactors-specific experience, multiple implementation certifications, and C1 German — none of these appear in Boru's profile. This is a deep technical SAP HR consulting role, not a general PMO or programme governance role. Application is not recommended.
